chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-115 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of MA No.581/2025. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2025 Mr. Imam Bakhsh Daro advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, I.O. Abdul Khaliq Jhatiyal SDPO Hussainabad, SIP Muhammad Faisal Arain PS B-Section and I.O. SIP Liaquat Ali Mangi PS B-Section. Mr. Ayaz Hussain Tunio advocate files Vakalatnama and comments on behalf of respondents No.5 to 7, taken on record. Investigating Officer present submits that statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Rubab Tahiya has been recorded, wherein she has denied the allegations; however, she submits that he found Talaknama is a fake which petitioner denied and submits that it is genuine. Petitioner No.1 also present in person and submits that she out of her own wish and consent has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 Zaheer Abbas. She further submits that her parents present in Court today have given assurance that they will make compromise. She contends that she is ready and willing to go with her husband with whom she is already residing happily. Under the circumstances, this petition is disposed of with direction to the Investigating Officer of the case to file a report in the light of the statement of the petitioner No.1 made today before the concerned Magistrate. Investigating Officer and other officials are also directed to provide the petitioners as and when they are required and the petitioner No.2 or any nominated person in the Crime No.08/2025 under section 365-B, 493-A PC registered at PS B-Section Latifabad Hyderabad shall not be arrested.

Under the circumstances, this petition is disposed of with direction to the Investigating Officer of the case to file a report in the light of the statement of the petitioner No.1 made today before the concerned Magistrate. Investigating Officer and other officials are also directed to provide the petitioners as and when they are required and the petitioner No.2 or any nominated person in the Crime No.08/2025 under section 365-B, 493-A PC registered at PS B-Section Latifabad Hyderabad shall not be arrested. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
